Title: Novita AI – Model Libraries & GPU Cloud - Deploy, Scale & Innovate URL Source: https://novita.ai/pricing Markdown Content: # Pricing | Novita AI [![Image 1: logo](https://novita.ai/logo/logo.svg)](https://novita.ai/) [Model APIs](https://novita.ai/models)[Agent Sandbox![Image 2: new](https://novita.ai/sandbox/console/new.png)](https://novita.ai/sandbox) GPUs [Pricing](https://novita.ai/pricing)[Docs](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/introduction)[Blog](https://blogs.novita.ai/) Log In Get Started # Pricing Explore pricing for our Model APIs and GPU resources. Find the right plan to match your needs with transparent rates and flexible options. # Pricing Explore pricing for our Model APIs and GPU resources. Find the right plan to match your needs with transparent rates and flexible options. Serverless Endpoints Dedicated Endpoints Agent Sandbox GPUs Batch inference is available at an introductory 50% discount on input and output tokens for supported models.[Learn more](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-batch-api) All LLM Image Audio Video Cache Providers:All ### ![Image 3:
